title: Expose the Relay MVP core through a default-off HTTP API
outputs: Relay HTTP router supports host registration, pairing code creation, mobile pairing, presence, revocation, encrypted envelope append, and cursor replay
Relay API remains disabled unless POCKET_VIBE_RELAY_API is explicitly enabled
Backend tests cover default-off mounting and the API happy path
do_not_do: Do not add persistent account storage
Do not require cloud DNS, certificates, or payment accounts
Do not route existing LAN WebSocket traffic through relay in this task
Do not accept plaintext payload envelopes
